home.title: Design-and-build partner for restaurant owners in Vietnam.

metadata.title: Capabilities - New Sky
metadata.description: New Sky core capabilities, 3,000sqm stainless-steel workshop, and six-step construction process.

hero.title: End-to-end restaurant design and construction from concept to opening day.
hero.description: New Sky organizes five core capabilities under one accountable partner, combining a 3,000sqm stainless-steel workshop and a six-step construction process to control programme, quality, and handover.

capabilitiesIntro.title: A capability system for the full restaurant delivery lifecycle.
capabilitiesIntro.description: From design drawings, MEP, industrial kitchen stainless steel, and construction through installation and operational handover, New Sky controls the full process through one integrated team.

capabilities.title: Interior Design
capabilities.description: Architecture and interior drawings from initial concept to construction details, aligned with each restaurant brand position.

capabilities.title: MEP Systems
capabilities.description: Electrical, water supply, wastewater, ventilation, smoke extraction, and fire-safety coordination, including mall management requirements when needed.

capabilities.title: Industrial Kitchen Stainless Steel
capabilities.description: Stainless-steel tables, shelves, cabinets, sinks, and kitchen equipment systems produced directly at New Sky's 3,000sqm in-house workshop.

capabilities.title: Construction
capabilities.description: Site renovation, partition works, and floor - wall - ceiling finishes executed according to approved construction drawings.

capabilities.title: Installation + Operational Handover
capabilities.description: Equipment installation, testing, acceptance, technical document handover, and 30-day initial operational support after opening.

factory.title: 3,000sqm stainless-steel workshop in Ha Dong, Hanoi
factory.description: The in-house workshop gives New Sky full control from design to kitchen stainless-steel fabrication instead of relying on outside fabricators. This is the foundation for shortening delivery timelines by 2-3 times and controlling quality from CNC cutting, bending, and welding through packing and installation.

processIntro.title: From survey to handover, every step has clear scope, timing, and ownership.
processIntro.description: This process is shaped by 10 years and 100+ restaurant projects, balancing shorter timelines, quality control, and cost transparency before contract signing.

process.title: Survey
process.scope: Measure the site, record electrical, water, and drainage conditions, and review landlord requirements for mall projects.

process.title: Design
process.scope: Initial concept and detailed drawings across architecture, interiors, MEP, and kitchen stainless steel, adjusted until approval.

process.title: Quotation + Contract
process.scope: Break down materials, labour, timeline, and equipment; prepare detailed quotation, sign contract, and collect deposit.

process.title: Workshop Production
process.scope: Produce stainless-steel and furniture items at the Ha Dong workshop while preparing construction and MEP materials in parallel.

process.title: Site Installation
process.scope: Transport and install stainless steel, MEP, and construction finishes, then test equipment on site.

process.title: Handover + Warranty
process.scope: Acceptance, technical document handover, initial operation training, and 12-month warranty for stainless-steel and installation works.

deliverables.title: Service deliverables
deliverables.description: Detailed scope items and execution value for this service.

relatedProjects.title: Related projects
relatedProjects.description: Case studies that prove execution capability for this service.

cta.label: Service enquiry
cta.title: Ready to scope your project?
cta.description: Get in touch for a tailored consultation and project quotation.
